raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Affordable housing developers already operate on razor thin margins.",
    "Knowing what fees developers need to pay ahead of time provides a level of certainty and reduces the number of projects that fall short of funding.",
    "Fees imposed by cities and counties can account for up to eighteen percent of the cost of the affordable housing project.",
    "Lack of transparency about fees can lead to delays or stalling of affordable housing projects.",
    "Current law requires cities and counties to clearly post fees online."
  ]
}
```
